{{Description|[[Amber]] and [[Collei]] are carrying out [[Jean]]'s orders. They're doing great in their search, but it doesn't hurt to have a little fun in the middle... does it?}}
'''Ludi Harpastum''' is Chapter 9 of the ''[[Genshin Impact]]'' [[manga]].

==Summary==
[[Dottore]] receives a letter bearing news of the deaths of two [[Snezhnaya]]n diplomats in [[Mondstadt]]. One of his [[Barnabas|henchmen]] suggests using this incident as an opportunity. Disinterested, Dottore sends him off to handle the situation. 

Back in the [[Mondstadt City|city of Mondstadt]], Amber and Collei scout the area and discover another [[Fatui]] device, but it has been destroyed by a small blade. She explains the wind and importance of the [[Anemo Archon]] but Collei turns them down, believing the [[god]]s only favor certain people while outcasts are mistreated. Desperate to win her over, Amber drags Collei to [[Ludi Harpastum]]. At the festival, Amber shows Collei the wonders of the event.

==Trivia==
* On the Chinese official website, the original Page 13 was removed, likely due to the {{w|Rising Sun Flag}} imagery in the background. The flag is controversial in China, where it is seen as a symbol of Japanese imperialism and militarism.
